title: Theeraadhae Aasaigal Lyrics Orange Mittai Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Song: Theeraadhae Aasaigal
Singer(s): Justin Prabhakaran & Karthik
Movie: Orange Mittai (2015)
Lyrics: Justin Prabhakaran

Theeraadhey aasaigal,
nadhi yengum mazhai vaanam naan
oyaadhey osaigal,
alaipaayum kadal oram dhan
naan pogum saalaigal,
mudiyaadha neelangal

Theeraadhey en aasaigaley
oyaadhey en osaigaley
neeladho en saalaigaley
vegu dhooram poi vara

Theeraadhey aasaigal,
nadhi yengum mazhai vaanam naan
oyaadhey osaigal,
alaipaayum kadal oram dhan

Siragugal illa paravayai kandaen vaanin meedheley
Nilavugal illa iravinai kandaen thongum podhiley
vidhi ennum veedhiyil, nadanthu naan pogiren
Idhu pogum paadhai yaarodhaan arivaar sol

Theeraadhey en aasaigaley
oyaadhey en osaigaley
neeladho en saalaigaley
vegu dhooram poi vara

Mudivugal ellam mudindhida illai,
 irudhiyil thodangidathan
Idindhadhu ellam udaindhida illai,
inaindhidum vazhi irundhal
Marandhidum Nyabagam tholaindhidum thedal dhan
Karai illa kadalin alaiyai naan varuveney

Theeraadhey en aasaigaley
oyaadhey en osaigaley
neeladho en saalaigaley
vegu dhooram poi vara

Theeraadhey aasaigal,
nadhi yengum mazhai vaanam naan
oyaadhey osaigal,
alaipaayum kadal oram dhan
naan pogum saalaigal,
mudiyaadha neelangal

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Theeraadhae Aasaigal?

The song expresses feelings of longing and dreams, reflecting on the beauty of love and the emotions tied to it.

What is the plot context of the movie Orange Mittai?

The movie revolves around the life of a man who embarks on a journey of self-discovery, and the song encapsulates his emotional experiences.

Who are the artists involved in this song?

The song features the talented singer Karthik and is penned by Justin Prabhakaran.

When was Theeraadhae Aasaigal released?

The song was released on August 1, 2015.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Theeraadhae Aasaigal, the protagonist reflects on his dreams and aspirations, encapsulating the essence of love and longing. The song's soothing melody and heartfelt lyrics evoke a sense of nostalgia and emotional depth. It beautifully complements the narrative of Orange Mittai, highlighting the character's journey and emotional struggles. This track resonates with anyone who has experienced the bittersweet nature of love.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Theeraadhae Aasaigal from the movie Orange Mittai captures the essence of longing and romance with its soothing melody. Karthik's soulful voice combined with Justin Prabhakaran's poignant lyrics creates an unforgettable listening experience. Dive into the emotions of love and nostalgia that this beautiful track evokes.
stanzaMeanings: Unfulfilled desires, the river is like rain everywhere. I won't let my cries go unheard, I will go towards the sea, where the endless horizons are unreachable.
Unfulfilled are my desires, don't let my cries go unheard. The blue skies, my dreams, are far away.
Unfulfilled desires, the river is like rain everywhere. I won't let my cries go unheard, I will go towards the sea.
I have seen the wings without flight, on the sky above. I have seen the moon without light, when the time comes to rest. I walk on the path of fate, who knows where it leads?
Unfulfilled are my desires, don't let my cries go unheard. The blue skies, my dreams, are far away.

Not all endings are complete, they just begin again. Not everything that breaks is lost, if there is a way to connect. Forgetting and losing memories is just a search. I will come to the waves of the sea without a shore.
Unfulfilled are my desires, don't let my cries go unheard. The blue skies, my dreams, are far away.
Unfulfilled desires, the river is like rain everywhere. I won't let my cries go unheard, I will go towards the sea, where the endless horizons are unreachable.
